item.title: Walmart is selling an 'awesome' winter coat for just $50 right now
item.description: Shoppers describe it as "unbelievable top quality."

item.title: TSA issues no official warning on popular holiday foods
item.description: With the "three-one-one" liquid rule for air travel in place since 2006, the Transportation Security Administration (TSA) periodically takes to social...

item.title: Beloved candy chain files Chapter 11 bankruptcy
item.description: While Willy Wonka made it look easy, running a candy brand when you can't rely on unpaid Oompa Loompa labor comes with added challenges. Fine chocolat...

item.title: Amazon is selling a farmhouse-style nightstand set for only $71
item.description: Shoppers say they're better than similar, more expensive styles at other retailers.

item.title: Morgan Stanley tweaks Micron stock price target as pressure builds
item.description: Micron (MU) stock just got another major nod of approval from Wall Street, and the timing is telling. Shares of the popular memory maker are up 10% ov...
